code: import React from'react';import'./ProjectAnalytics.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ProjectAnalytics=()=>{const chartData=[{day:'M',height:60,active:false},{day:'T',height:100,active:true},{day:'W',height:80,active:true},{day:'T',height:120,active:true},{day:'F',height:40,active:false},{day:'S',height:30,active:false},{day:'S',height:50,active:false}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"project-analytics",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"analytics-header",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Project Analytics"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"chart-container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"chart-bars",children:chartData.map((item,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"chart-bar-wrapper",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"chart-bar ".concat(item.active?'active':'inactive'),style:{height:"".concat(item.height,"px")}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"chart-label",children:item.day})]},index))})})]});};export default ProjectAnalytics;
